bead.title: Add LifecycleDef to CollectionSchema and parse from ESF (prereq for transition_lifecycle)
bead.description: CRITICAL INFRASTRUCTURE GAP: CollectionSchema (axon-schema/src/schema.rs) has no 'lifecycles' field. EsfDocument.into_collection_schema() at line 209 hardcodes gates=HashMap::new() and has no lifecycle parsing — the ESF 'lifecycles:' section in fixtures/beads.esf.yaml is silently dropped. Without this, transition_lifecycle (axon-0f9c54cf) has no data to validate transitions against. Required changes: (1) axon-schema/src/schema.rs: add LifecycleDef { field: String, initial: String, transitions: HashMap<String, Vec<String>> } struct with Serialize/Deserialize. (2) Add lifecycles: HashMap<String, LifecycleDef> to CollectionSchema with #[serde(default)]. (3) Add lifecycles: Option<Value> to EsfDocument. (4) In EsfDocument.into_collection_schema(): parse lifecycles from the Option<Value> the same way link_types are parsed. (5) CollectionSchema::new() initializes lifecycles to HashMap::new(). No storage changes needed — lifecycle defs are stored as part of the CollectionSchema JSON blob.
bead.acceptance: EsfDocument::parse() on beads.esf.yaml produces a CollectionSchema with lifecycles['status'].field='status', lifecycles['status'].initial='draft', and transitions['draft']=[pending, cancelled]; CollectionSchema with no lifecycles section deserializes with lifecycles=HashMap::new() (serde default); CollectionSchema serializes/deserializes lifecycle definitions round-trip without loss; existing tests pass
